description: This Dart source file defines the 'AppDatabase' class responsible for managing local database operations for outages, jobs, and notifications in a smart outage management frontend application. It includes schema creation, data seeding, CRUD operations, and model mappings.

classes.name: AppDatabase
classes.description: Primary class handling database initialization, schema creation, data seeding, and CRUD operations for outages, jobs, and notifications.

methods.name: init
methods.description: Initializes the database, sets database path, and creates schema and seed data.

methods.name: _createSchema
methods.description: Creates tables for outages, jobs, and notifications.

methods.name: _seed
methods.description: Inserts initial test data into outages, jobs, and notifications tables.

methods.name: listOutages
methods.description: Retrieves a list of all outages ordered by report time.

methods.name: getOutage
methods.description: Fetches a single outage by its ID.

methods.name: upsertOutage
methods.description: Inserts or replaces an outage record.

methods.name: listJobs
methods.description: Retrieves all jobs ordered by creation time.

methods.name: upsertJob
methods.description: Inserts or replaces a job record.

methods.name: listNotifications
methods.description: Retrieves all notifications ordered by creation time.

methods.name: insertNotification
methods.description: Inserts or replaces a notification record.

methods.name: _outageFromRow
methods.description: Converts a database row into an Outage object.

methods.name: _outageToRow
methods.description: Converts an Outage object into a database row.

methods.name: _jobFromRow
methods.description: Converts a database row into a Job object.

methods.name: _jobToRow
methods.description: Converts a Job object into a database row.

methods.name: _notificationFromRow
methods.description: Converts a database row into an AppNotification object.

methods.name: _notificationToRow
methods.description: Converts an AppNotification object into a database row.
